title: ocimum obovatum subsp. crystallinum
intro: Ocimum obovatum subsp. crystallinum, also known as crystalline basil, is a subspecies of the Ocimum obovatum plant, a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The medicinal properties of Ocimum obovatum subsp. crystallinum are believed to provide several health benefits, including the relief of respiratory issues, fever reduction, and wound healing. This plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
